name: Jumping Assault
statusOutcome: Gren starts running and jumping around [TargetName], who quickly gets dazed following her acrobatics, until she launches a surprise attack at him and catches him with a triumphant look, restraining his movements.
statusMiss: [AttackerName] leaps at [TargetName], but [TargetHeOrShe] dodges at the last second, narrowly avoiding [AttackerHisOrHer] clutches!
restraintEscapedFail: … but despite the slickness of [AttackerHisOrHer] skin, [AttackerHeOrShe] proves to be as sticky as a leech!
